overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking through a red rock canyon during golden hour. The character traverses from an enclosed canyon passage through to an open desert landscape, with dramatic lighting and atmospheric dust effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide canyon floor with massive red rock formations

events.description: character turns left to enter the narrow canyon passage

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily toward the rock wall and turning left into the canyon

entered.detail: tall red layered rock wall forming the left boundary of the canyon
tall red layered rock wall forming the right boundary of the canyon
massive monolithic rock wall directly ahead with vertical striations
loose rocks and boulders scattered across the sandy canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a cowboy walking through a wide desert canyon during golden hour. The character approaches a massive rock formation ahead before turning left into a narrower passage. Tall red canyon walls frame the scene on both sides, with sunlight streaming through dust particles in the air.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow slot canyon passage with towering walls

events.description: approaching the canyon exit, light becomes brighter and more backlit creating silhouette effect

agents.ego_description: continuing straight through the narrow canyon passage toward the light at the end

entered.detail: natural archway opening at the end of the canyon showing bright sky beyond

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow slot canyon with towering red walls closing in on both sides. The sky is mostly obscured above, with only a strip of light visible. As the character progresses, the canyon exit becomes visible in the distance, backlit by the setting sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon exit opening to desert vista

events.description: exiting the narrow canyon into the open desert landscape

agents.ego_description: walking out of the canyon into the open desert, silhouetted against the bright sky

entered.detail: expansive sky with scattered clouds visible beyond the canyon exit
mountain silhouettes visible on the horizon beyond the desert plain

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow canyon into a wide open desert landscape. The lighting shifts to a dramatic backlit silhouette as the sky opens up above, revealing distant mountains on the horizon. The canyon walls recede into the background as the character walks into the expansive desert vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a cowboy traverses a red rock canyon that transitions from a wide passage into a claustrophobic slot canyon before opening into a vast desert vista. It begins with the character walking through a wide canyon during golden hour, moving toward a massive rock formation before turning left into a narrower corridor where sunlight streams through floating dust particles. As the character progresses, the towering red walls close in on both sides, obscuring the sky until only a thin strip of light remains above. The scene then shifts as the character approaches a backlit exit, finally emerging from the narrow confines into an expansive desert landscape. The lighting transforms into a dramatic silhouette against a wide-open sky, revealing distant mountains on the horizon as the canyon walls recede into the background.
